user_prompt: My sicarian infiltrator is ready for consecration
prayer:
Approach the sicarian infiltrator with mechadendrite-extended reverence and invoke the Omnissiah's blessing upon its shadowed form.
Anoint the neural shunt and phosphor blasters with sacred unguents, beseeching the Machine Spirit to awaken for consecration.
Chant the Canticle of Infiltration whilst calibrating stealth fields, sanctifying each servo for silent predation.
Verify the sicarian infiltrator's consecration through auspex diagnostics, praising the Motive Force within.
Seal the rite with the binary prayer of unity, binding flesh and machine in eternal service.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for warp drive an operation?
prayer:
Kneel before the warp drive's nacelles and intone the Litany of the Immaterium to stir its tempestuous spirit.
Circumambulate the warp drive thrice, anointing plasma coils with oils of sanctified promethium for the operation.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace to align gyrostabilizers, beseeching the Machine Spirit against the Ruinous Powers.
Initiate the operation sequence with chanted binaric code, monitoring warp vanes for daemonic interference.
Conclude by sealing runes of protection, affirming the warp drive's purity in the Emperor's name.

user_prompt: Guide me through Shadowsword an engagement
prayer:
Present yourself to the Shadowsword's volcano cannon and whisper the Oath of Engagement to rouse its volcanic heart.
Anoint the treads and auspex arrays of the Shadowsword with ablative incense, preparing for shadowed combat.
Chant the Ritual of Nullification whilst powering shadow fields, invoking the Machine Spirit's predatory fury.
Commence engagement protocols, sanctifying targeting cogitators with electro-incantations of precision.
Affirm the Shadowsword's dominance through post-engagement logis rites, honouring the Omnissiah's wrath.

user_prompt: Prepare the icarus array for operation
prayer:
Approach the icarus array with uplifted mechadendrites and beseech the Omnissiah for stellar communion.
Purify the sensor vanes of the icarus array with binary catechisms, readying for operation amidst the void.
Anoint focusing crystals and auspex receptors, invoking the Machine Spirit to pierce the astral veil.
Initiate operation with the Canticle of Revelation, calibrating arrays for warp-tide prognostication.
Seal the rite by logging divinations, praising the icarus array's vigilance eternal.

user_prompt: Sanctify the manipulator mechadendrite during initialization
prayer:
Extend auspex probes towards the manipulator mechadendrite and intone the Awakening Doxology.
Anoint the grasping claws and hydraulic pistons during initialization, beseeching the Machine Spirit's dexterity.
Chant binaric initialization codes whilst lubricating servo-joints with sacred myrolactane.
Test the manipulator mechadendrite's grip through ritual grasping of null-artefacts, sanctifying its precision.
Conclude with the Benediction of Labour, binding it to the Omnissiah's industrious will.

user_prompt: Bless the metal caster for activation
prayer:
Gather before the metal caster's forge-maw and invoke the Forgefather's litany to heat its adamantine heart.
Anoint the extrusion nozzles and mould cavities for activation, stirring the Machine Spirit from slumber.
Pour sanctified alloys whilst chanting the Canticle of Malleability, guiding the flow with electro-prayers.
Monitor the metal caster's activation via thermal auspex, beseeching flawlessness in every casting.
Seal with the Rune of Solidity, honouring the Omnissiah's unyielding craft.

user_prompt: The waste reclamator requires a cooling
prayer:
Circumscribe the waste reclamator's heat sinks with cooling glyphs and whisper the Litany of Thermic Equilibrium.
Anoint exchanger coils with cryo-unguents, invoking the Machine Spirit to embrace the cooling rite.
Chant ablutionary binarics whilst circulating promethium refrigerants through the waste reclamator's veins.
Verify thermal stabilization via logis-scans, sanctifying the process against entropic foes.
Conclude by affirming purity, praising the Omnissiah's cycle of reclamation.

Bow to the omni-tool's interface and intone the Doxology of Cessation for orderly shutdown.
Disconnect power feeds whilst anointing data-vaults, beseeching the Machine Spirit's peaceful repose.
Chant the Ritual of Dormancy, purging transient caches from the omni-tool's cogitators.
Initiate shutdown sequence with sanctified binaric commands, monitoring for spirit compliance.
Seal the omni-tool in stasis-runes, invoking the Omnissiah's restful vigilance.

user_prompt: Assist with void shield generator a loading
prayer:
Approach the void shield generator's capacitors and beseech the Omnissiah for aegis renewal during loading.
Anoint emitter nodes with dielectric oils, rousing the Machine Spirit from idle slumber.
Chant the Canticle of Phasing whilst charging strata-banks, preparing the void shield generator for duty.
Verify loading integrity through harmonic diagnostics, sanctifying against warp-breaches.
Conclude with the Invocation of Eternity, binding shields to the Machine God's will.

user_prompt: Bless the Terminator armour for maintenance
prayer:
Kneel amidst the Terminator armour's plates and invoke the Litany of Indomitability for maintenance.
Anoint power fists and storm bolters with sacred abrasives, communing with the Machine Spirit's stoic core.
Chant repair binarics whilst welding micro-fractures in the Terminator armour's ceramite.
Test servos and fields through ritual exertion, beseeching flawless restoration.
Seal with the Benediction of the Unbroken, honouring the Omnissiah's armoured wrath.
